OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson II; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Melvin Carlisle is present.
Attorney Rob Gold appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnik, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAY-28-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
